nasb.text: Thus He showed me, and behold, the Lord was standing by a vertical wall with a plumb line in His hand.

esv.text: This is what he showed me: behold, the Lord was standing beside a wall built with a plumb line, with a plumb line in his hand.

cnv.text: 他向我這樣顯示：看哪！主站在一道按準繩建造的牆旁邊，手裡拿著準繩。

ccb.text: 以下是祂让我看见的异象：看啊，主站在一道按照准绳建造的墙边，手里拿着准绳。
